title: Hackathon 2026: Code the Future
description: A 24-hour campus hackathon to solve civic problems using modern technology stacks. Prizes up to $5000.

title: Introduction to ROS (Robot Operating System)
description: Learn the basics of ROS and start building commands for standard robotic units in our lab.

title: Inter-Department Football Finals
description: Watch CS battle Mechanical in the annual soccer final match. Free snacks and sodas for attendees.

title: AI/ML Workshop: Fine-tuning Open Weights Models
description: Hands-on coding session to fine-tune Llama models on campus hardware using HuggingFace and PyTorch.

title: Acoustic Night: Live in the Courtyard
description: Relax and listen to acoustic covers and original songs performed by talented college musicians.

title: Resume Review & Tech Interview Prep
description: Get feedback on your resume from senior engineers visiting from local tech giants.

title: Competitive Coding Contest: CodeRush
description: 3-hour algorithm race on HackerRank. Top 3 programmers get Amazon vouchers.

title: Creative Writing Workshop
description: Learn plot design and character development from award-winning novelist Sarah Jenkins.

title: Circuit Design using Altium Designer
description: A comprehensive introductory session on schematic capture and PCB routing fundamentals.

title: College Chess Championship
description: Annual Swiss-system tournament. All skill levels welcome. Chess boards provided.

title: Entrepreneurship Summit: Startup Sparks
description: Pitch your business ideas to visiting venture capitalists and angel investors.

title: Photography Walk: Campus at Dusk
description: Learn landscape and golden-hour photography settings. Bring your own DSLR or phone camera.

title: RoboWars: Combat Arena Selection
description: Spectator event. Battle-tested student robots clash in a closed steel box arena.

title: Blockchain & Web3 Fundamentals
description: Demystify decentralization, consensus engines, smart contracts, and Ethereum solidity basics.

title: Annual Cultural Fest: PulseRhythm
description: Day 1: Dance competitions, street plays, and band performances. Food trucks parked outside.

title: PulseRhythm: DJ Concert & Closing Ceremony
description: Day 2: Performance by internationally acclaimed DJ Electro-Vibe. Registration mandatory.

title: Introduction to Quantum Computing
description: A guest lecture by Dr. Alan Thorne on qubits, superposition, and basic quantum circuits.

title: Arduino for Beginners
description: Bootcamp on microcontrollers, analog sensors, servo motors, and basic programming.

title: IoT & Home Automation
description: Build smart switches connected to ESP32 microcontrollers. Connect to MQTT brokers.

title: Model United Nations (MUN) Orientation
description: Overview of delegate procedures, agenda curation, and research tools for the upcoming conference.

title: Table Tennis Singles Championship
description: Knockout table tennis tournament. Trophies for top 3 finishers.

title: 3D Printing & CAD Design Masterclass
description: Learn Fusion 360 basics and export your designs to our department's Prusa 3D printers.

title: Cybersecurity Capture The Flag (CTF)
description: Jeopardy-style CTF covering cryptography, reverse engineering, web exploitation, and forensics.

title: Theater & Drama Auditions
description: Open auditions for the annual theater production of 'Hamlet'. Prepare a 2-minute monologue.

title: Volleyball Friendly Match
description: Come join a casual weekend volleyball game. Mix-and-match teams formed on the spot.

title: Alumni Talk: Life After College in Big Tech
description: Interactive Q&A with tech executives who graduated from our college. Refreshments served.
